hero.name: Yuil Jeong
hero.title: From Mathematics to Data Architecture to AI Product Builder
hero.subtitle: For 14 years, I've worked to bridge the gap between data and decisions. From EA to Disney+, even brilliant models fell short without the right architecture to turn insight into action. Now I build the products that close that gap.

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: It started with a question: why do organizations collect mountains of data but still make decisions by gut? At NEOWIZ, building my first KPI dashboards, I saw the gap firsthand — the problem was never the numbers, but the missing architecture between data and decisions. That question has driven every role since.
about.p2: At Electronic Arts, I stopped waiting for someone else to fix it. I designed telemetry systems from scratch across four countries, building the infrastructure that turned raw player behavior into actionable insight. At Disney+ APAC, the stakes grew — I led the Korea Data Science team to shape a $1B content investment strategy through ML-driven churn analysis, causal inference, and audience segmentation. The pattern was always the same: find the structural gap, build the bridge.
about.p3: Now I've taken that conviction to its logical end. As CEO of JNJ Corporation, I don't just analyze problems — I build the solutions. When pet owners couldn't trust ingredient labels, I built an OCR→LLM analysis pipeline. When kids needed immersive English practice without screen fatigue, I designed a real-time Voice AI conversation engine. Every product I ship starts with a real problem I've seen people struggle with — then I architect the data layer, write the code, and put it in their hands.

items.desc: I discover problems customers actually experience and build solutions end-to-end, applying AI to make products more valuable through data. mungme solves the pet food ingredient transparency problem — I developed a solution that analyzes ingredients through photo capture using OCR and LLM technology, and synchronized 4 commerce APIs to provide users with a comprehensive analysis database. MyVoice reduces the burden of English private education while delivering daily native-speaker conversation experiences; to help parents who want to track not only their children's learning growth but also emotional well-being, I'm building the service with a proprietary AI engine and best-in-class technologies. I also support digital transformation across various industries, including JR Law Firm's digital presence, and communicate with broader audiences through a growth analytics book.

Driven by a mission to make healthy living accessible for everyone, I plan and deliver healthy food products for busy modern people. I tackle today's food and wellness challenges through technology and data-driven digital strategy.

Led the Korea Data Science team and established a data-driven decision-making framework. Contributed to a $1B Korean content investment strategy through data analysis, and designed ML-driven churn analysis and customer segmentation models to refine subscriber retention strategies. Measured the true ROI of marketing campaigns through causal analysis and optimized budget allocation.

items.org: Korean Statistical Society & Korea Business Experimentation Symposium
items.desc: Presented 'Building an Experiment Culture' at the Korean Statistical Society Winter Conference (Seoul National University) and the Korea Business Experimentation Symposium (Korea University). Shared a governance framework for systematically scaling A/B testing and causal inference in data-driven organizations, along with real-world application case studies.
Evaluated and advised on creative proposals across audio, animation, and series formats. Identified promising projects within Korea's content ecosystem and supported their growth.

Built and led the global data analytics team from the ground up, covering four APAC markets — Korea, China, Thailand, and Vietnam. Designed telemetry systems to collect and analyze player behavior data, and developed competitive game attribution models for eSports marketing and ML-based user behavior prediction models, establishing a data-driven decision-making culture.

Analyzed monthly business performance and defined core KPIs to support executive decision-making. Designed BI tools and formulated global game service platform strategies, contributing to mobile business expansion.

Built BI systems for mobile platforms and automated KPI dashboards to enable real-time performance monitoring. Derived service improvement insights through customer statistics analysis, marking the start of my career as a data analyst.

items.title: mungme
items.desc: Pet owners can't trust what's in their pet's food. I built a platform that scans ingredient labels via OCR→LLM analysis, syncs products from 4 commerce APIs, and gives transparent nutritional data — Spring Boot + Next.js full-stack, Claude Agent SDK automation.

items.title: MyVoice
items.desc: Kids need conversation practice, not more screen time. I'm building a voice AI app where children talk with AI characters in real-time — Whisper STT→GPT→TTS pipeline, character voices, 3-phase learning flow, and parent analytics dashboard.

items.title: Growth Analytics Book
items.desc: Too many analytics teams measure everything and change nothing. I'm writing the playbook I wish I'd had — 14+ years of growth frameworks distilled into actionable chapters.

items.title: JR Law Firm Website
items.desc: A law firm needed a digital presence that reflects its professionalism. I designed and developed a modern, responsive website from scratch.
Bridged quantitative expertise with strategic business thinking. Studied advanced management frameworks applicable to data-driven decision-making.
Built the mathematical foundation — statistics, linear algebra, and analytical reasoning — that underpins a career in data science and architecture.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.tagline: If you have a problem worth solving, let's build it.
contact.desc: I work best with people who see a real gap and want to close it — whether that's a data challenge, an AI product, or a business that needs to be built from scratch.
